sections.paragraph:
Original: תּעע

Transliteration: tâ‛a‛

Phonetic: taw-ah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to deceive, misuse
    1. (Pilpel)
      1. to be a mocker, mock
      2. mocker (substantive)
    2. (Hithpalpel)
      1. to ridicule
      2. mocking (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2532

Part(s) of speech: Verb
